incident_report:
# Incident Report: Seed 41 Dungeon Run

**Summary:** Agent A and Agent B failed to complete the dungeon objective within the 50-turn limit, reaching turn 51 with zero progress and no key pickup or door unlock achieved. The run was severely hampered by eight spurious_block anomalies that occurred during movement actions across both agents, with Agent A encountering five of these anomalies (turns 11, 12, 18, 25, 31, 48) and Agent B encountering two (turns 30, 49). The repeated anomalies suggest either a pathfinding issue causing agents to repeatedly attempt blocked routes, or environmental conditions that spawned false obstacles. The critical failure point occurred early at turns 11-12 when Agent A immediately encountered consecutive movement blocks, which may have forced both agents into suboptimal navigation patterns that persisted through turn 49. Without any DM interactions or messages sent, the agents appeared unable to adapt their strategy or communicate around the anomalous obstacles, ultimately exhausting the turn budget before securing any objectives.
